title: The Door That Opened Alone
content: Employees working late at an old office building often noticed one particular door opening slowly without anyone nearby. The unusual event happened only on windy evenings, making the mystery even more puzzling. Eventually, a maintenance technician investigated the doorway and discovered that changes in air pressure caused by the building's ventilation system gently pulled the heavy door open whenever certain windows were left unlocked. After adjusting the door closer, the mysterious movement stopped. What had inspired endless stories among coworkers was ultimately explained by nothing more than physics and a carefully hidden draft.
